channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The Best Samsung Phones of 2026, Tested and Reviewed
item.description: From flagship and budget to flipping and folding, Samsung’s Galaxy range spans the breadth of the smartphone cosmos. WIRED’s here to help you make your choice.

item.title: DJI aussi a son action cam POV : l’Osmo Nano, qui filme en 4K, est à prix cassé
item.description: Tout comme Insta360, DJI propose désormais une caméra d'action conçue pour la prise de vue à la première personne : l'Osmo Nano, qui filme en plus en 4K. AliExpress la propose en ce moment à 221,18 euros au lieu de 279 euros.

item.title: Tesla a breveté une remorque un peu particulière : comment elle pourrait booster l’autonomie de ses voitures électriques
item.description: Tesla a breveté un prolongateur d'autonomie sous la forme d'une remorque chargée de batteries. De quoi augmenter l'autonomie d'une voiture électrique, même si les chances d'arrivée sur le marché sont minces : la marque a déjà annulé un projet similaire sur son Cybertruck.

item.title: Should We Be Hyped—or Freaked Out—About Nuclear Microreactors?
item.description: Microreactors could be coming very soon to commercial grids. Is that a good thing? We asked the experts.

item.title: Samsung Frame Pro Review: A Good TV for a Pretty Living Room
item.description: This is the first truly impressive art TV I’ve seen.

item.title: How to watch IPL 2026: live streams, fixture list for Indian Premier League cricket season
item.description: All the ways to watch IPL 2026 live streams online, with Royal Challengers Bengaluru entering the 19th Indian Premier League season as reigning champions.

item.title: How to watch Virat Kohli at IPL 2026
item.description: All the ways to watch Virat Kohli at IPL 2026, with a well-rested VK eyeing back-to-back Indian Premier League titles with Royal Challengers Bengaluru.

item.title: I didn't think Something Very Bad is Going to Happen season 2 was possible — but Camila Morrone already has it all planned out
item.description: Something Very Bad is Going to Happen season 2 has not been confirmed by Netflix — but Camila Morrone is full of ideas for where to go next.

item.title: I tested the Tower Elite 11-Liter Flexi Drawer Air Fryer — it’s the best bang-for-buck large-capacity air fryer around
item.description: You’ll be hard-pressed to find a better value air fryer with a capacity that can match the Elite 11-Liter Flexi Drawer.

item.title: Best 360 Cameras (2026): DJI, Insta360, GoPro
item.description: It’s a small world after all, and these cameras can capture all of it at once, giving you a 360-degree view.

item.title: Amazons Spring Sale is surprisingly good this year: We found 150+ deals on Apple, Kindle, Sony, and Ninja
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale is back until March 31. Take $100 off Apple Watch Series 11, 60% off Shark robot vacuums, and Kindles for $95.

item.title: Amazon Big Spring Sale 2026: Live updates on the best deals
item.description: Get real-time updates on the Amazon Big Spring Sale 2026. We found record-low prices on Apple MacBooks, DJI drones, Kindles, Sony XM6 headphones, and more.

item.title: After living with the Sonos Play, I think it's the only speaker you need — here's why
item.description: The perfect wireless speaker doesn’t exis… Oh wait

item.title: Last call: Exclusive NordVPN 4-month bonus + Amazon gift card ends today
item.description: It's your last chance to claim year-low prices with 4 months extra protection

item.title: How I built an AI operating system to run my publishing company
item.description: If an AI agent can do the work of ten people, why would you pay for ten software seats?

item.title: You might be stuck in TSA lines for hours. Make sure you have these travel gadgets with you
item.description: As the government shutdown drags on, having devastating effects on Transportation Security Administration staffing, millions of Americans continue to face long lines at TSA checkpoints at airports nationwide. With the busy Easter holiday travel weekend around the corner, wait times are expected to worsen as the number of travelers increases. If you have a flight […] As the government shutdown drags on, having devastating effects on Transportation Security Administration staffing, millions of Americans continue to face long lines at TSA checkpoints at airports nationwide. With the busy Easter h...

item.title: Apple’s most important contribution over the past 50 years isn’t what you expect
item.description: It’s not the iPhone, iPad, or even the Mac. No, Apple’s most consequential creation over its 50-year history is something bigger—and it will be even more meaningful in the age of AI. Wednesday, April 1, marks 50 years since Apple was founded. Over the next week, you’ll no doubt see countless articles examining the company’s influence, with many likely focusing on which single Apple product had the most consequential impact on the tech industry and society as a whole. To be sure, there are myriad options to choose from, most notably, the original Macintosh, the iMac, the iPod, and the iPhone....

item.title: Is This The End of Hollywoods ‘Bad Moms’?
item.description: From If I Had Legs, I'd Kick You to Nightbitch and Die My Love, we look into the history of ‘bad moms’ on screen, and how recent films may be reflecting a wider cultural shift.

item.title: The DJI Mini 5 Pro drone has hit its record-low price at Amazon — save $500 this weekend
item.description: The DJI Mini 5 Pro Fly More Combo is on sale for $1,099 in the Amazon Spring Sale. That's the record-low price at Amazon.

item.title: The best cordless power tool deals in Amazons Spring Sale — score record-low prices on DeWalt
item.description: The cordless tool deals you can buy in the Amazon Big Spring Sale.

item.title: The best Pokémon deals in Amazons Big Spring Sale: Perfect Order and Ascended Heroes at new low prices
item.description: Shop Pokémon deals in Amazon's Big Spring Sale, from TCG boxes and tins to discounted Nintendo Switch games.

item.title: Were finding new Lego deals in Amazons Spring Sale — save on Tuxedo Cat and van Goghs The Starry Night
item.description: There are a ton of good deals on Legos hidden in Amazon's Big Spring sale, including new record-low prices on Lego Star Wars sets.

item.title: The best gaming deals in Amazons Big Spring Sale: Shop Nintendo Switch, PS5, and Xbox
item.description: Shop gaming deals live Amazon's Big Spring Sale, including gaming monitors and video games for PS5, Xbox, Nintendo Switch.

item.title: The best Samsung deals in Amazons Big Spring Sale — save on tablets, TVs, phones, watches, and gaming monitors
item.description: Shop the best early Samsung deals at Amazon, including savings on the Galaxy Tab S10 FE+, The Frame Pro TV, and more.

item.title: Ive tested dozens of portable power stations — heres what Id actually buy in Amazons Big Spring Sale
item.description: Portable power stations from Bluetti, Anker Solix, Jackery, and more are over 50% off during the Amazon Big Spring Sale.

item.title: Our favorite DJI deals from the Amazon Spring Sale: Drones, mics, and power stations at record lows
item.description: We gathered the best DJI deals from the Amazon Spring Sale. Save $20 on the cult-favorite Mic Mini; take 29% off DJI Mini 3 drones.

item.title: I test headphones and earbuds — heres what you should buy in Amazons Big Spring Sale
item.description: I spotted over 35 worthwhile headphones and earbuds deals live during Amazon's Spring Sale, from the Bose QuietComfort headphones to my favorite pair of sleep earbuds.

item.title: Ive tested e-readers for years — these are the best Kindle deals in the Amazon Big Spring Sale
item.description: During Amazon's Big Spring Sale, the Kindle Colorsoft is back down to its lowest price ever. Get it now for just $169.99, saving you $80 off. Plus, save $150 on the Kindle Scribe.

item.title: The best deals in Home Depots Spring Sale — score free power tools from DeWalt, Ryobi, and Milwaukee
item.description: Is Home Depot having a spring sale? Kind of. We found deals on cordless tools and lawn mowers, plus bedding, decor, rugs, and more.

item.title: Im a tech editor, and I found 40+ Amazon Big Spring Sale tech deals Id actually buy
item.description: I'm a tech editor, and I found the top tech deals from Amazon's Big Spring Sale. Grab Sony headphones for $48, Kindles for $94, and $250 off MacBooks.

item.title: iPads are selling out fast in Amazons Spring Sale: Score iPads starting at $299
item.description: Shop the best iPad deals from Apple during Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale. One M3 iPad Air has never been cheaper.

item.title: Apple AirTags have never been cheaper — get $15 trackers in Amazons Spring Sale
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale is live, and Apple AirTags are now at a record-low price.

item.title: Weve found the best AirPods deals to shop in Amazons Big Spring Sale — $99 AirPods are still live
item.description: We found the best AirPods deals to shop during Amazon's Big Spring Sale. Grab AirPods 4 for $99, and save $60 on AirPods Pro 3.

item.title: We found the best Apple Watch deals from Amazons Big Spring Sale — deals start at $189
item.description: Check out the best Apple Watch deals to shop during Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale. Save $60 on the Apple Watch SE 2 while it's 24% off.

item.title: I test laptops for a living — these are my favorite MacBook deals from the Amazon Big Spring Sale
item.description: We found the best MacBook deals at Amazon during the Big Spring Sale. Get a MacBook Neo for $689 and M4 MacBook Airs for $949, saving $250.

item.title: Stream for less in 2026: Score Spring Sale streaming deals on Paramount+, Spotify, Starz, and more
item.description: The best Big Spring Sale streaming deals include free offers on Spotify and Amazon Music Unlimited, plus $22 off Paramount+.

item.title: Amazon is clearing out last-gen tech in the Big Spring Sale: Apple and Sony on sale
item.description: We found the best deals on last-gen tech during Amazon's Big Spring Sale, with discounts on M4 MacBook Airs and Sony WF-1000XM5 earbuds.

item.title: Were tracking the best Apple deals in Amazons Spring Sale — new lows on AirPods, iPads, Apple Watches, and MacBooks
item.description: See all the best Apple deals from the Amazon Big Spring Sale, including $50 off AirPods Pro 3 and $250 off M4 MacBook Air laptops.

item.title: What home will look like for the Artemis 2 crew headed to the moon
item.description: NASA's Artemis 2 crew will live in a 330-cubic-foot capsule, Orion, as they fly around the moon. The flight could launch April 1.

item.title: Kindles are just $95 — get them at their best price in months during the Amazon Big Spring Sale
item.description: The best e-reader deal under $100 is on the basic Kindle. Get it on sale for just $94.99 at Amazon during the Big Spring Sale.

item.title: Say goodbye to monthly cloud fees with this 100TB lifetime plan
item.description: Lock in enough cloud storage for life with this 100TB lifetime subscription to Internxt Cloud Storage, now only $974.97 (reg. $9,900) through March 31.

item.title: This Microsoft Office deal adds AI capabilities to your favorite apps
item.description: Get the Microsoft Office suite, complete with AI capabilities, with this Microsoft Office 2024 Home and Business for Mac or PC Lifetime License, on sale now for $139.97 (reg. $249.99) through April 5.

item.title: This $60 app makes kids’ screen time easier to feel good about
item.description: Save on Pok Pok lifetime subscription for $59.99 (reg. $250) and give kids a Montessori-inspired learning app with open-ended play, no ads, and no in-app purchases.

item.title: Verizon is giving away the Google Pixel 10 Pro XL for free — how to claim yours this weekend
item.description: How to get free Google Pixel 10 Pro XL. Get the Google Pixel 10 Pro XL for free from Verizon when signing up for a new line.

item.title: TikToks mindfulness tips are getting better. These 3 worked for me
item.description: I tried social media's latest wellness trends, from 75 Smart to advice from Chinese aunties.

item.title: How to watch USA vs. Belgium online for free
item.description: How to watch live football for free. Live stream USA vs. Belgium in a 2026 International Friendly for free.

item.title: T-Mobile is giving away the Apple iPhone 17 for free — how to claim yours right now
item.description: How to get free iPhone. Get the Apple iPhone 17 for free or the iPhone 17 Pro for under $100 from T-Mobile with no trade-in required when switching to an Experience Beyond plan

item.title: The best hookup apps for 2026: I swiped until my thumb hurt
item.description: We tested the best hookup apps to help you find a fling, situationship, one-night stand, or whatever else you wanna call it.

item.title: Meilleures souris gamer pas chères : pour quel modèle à moins de 50 euros opter ?
item.description: La souris gaming est l'accessoire indispensable de tous les joueurs PC, qu'ils soient sur une machine fixe ou un PC portable gaming. Mais les prix grimpent vite... bienvenue sur notre sélection maison des meilleures souris gamer pas chères.

item.title: We loved this 8K drone when it launched — land a $400 saving on the Antigravity A1 drone in Amazons Spring Sale
item.description: As of March 28, the Antigravity A1 Infinity Bundle is down to $1,599, a saving of 20% from the list price of $1,999.

item.title: Xbox : Microsoft abandonne officiellement sa campagne « Ceci est une Xbox »
item.description: Pour vendre des consoles, il faut peut-être arrêter d'expliquer aux gens qu'ils n'en ont pas besoin. Asha Sharma change de stratégie. Un mois après son arrivée, elle a personnellement ordonné le retrait de la campagne "This is an Xbox" pour recentrer la marque sur son ADN.
